steps.title: Substitute the y value
steps.content:
The point is $(x,67)$, so $y=67$. The first inequality is true because $67>15$. Substitute $67$ into the second inequality.
$$5x+67<23$$

steps.title: Solve the constraint
steps.content:
Subtract $67$ and divide by $5$.
$$5x<-44$$
$$x<-\frac{44}{5}$$
$$x<-8.8$$
Only $-10$ is less than $-8.8$. The answer is A.
